Package Cataphract.API

package Cataphract.API
The API package contains all essential programs that helps in the functioning of Cataphract correctly. 
 These programs are independent modules or are designed to just return a value. These programs can be called
 by other kernels as specified in the Nion Directory Specification and Nion Kernel Specification, present in the
 EasyGuide documentation.

 Important links can be found here:

 https://dak404.github.io/Cataphract
Since:
v0.0.1 (10-April-2020, Zen Quantum)
Version:
v1.0.0 (11-October-2023, Cataphract)
Author:
DAK404 (https://github.com/DAK404)

    Build

    IOStreams
